rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §21.0543, which governs continuing education credits for digital technology instruction for educators.
quote: Sec. 21.0543. CONTINUING EDUCATION CREDIT FOR INSTRUCTION RELATED TO DIGITAL TECHNOLOGY.
_note: No conflict; the rule concerns educator continuing education and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
